calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Off Calendar

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell, a Division of Reed Elsevier (hereinafter "Martindale-Hubbell").
Douglas Whitmire, Regional Director for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant, Michael T. Welch, individually and dba Law Offices of Michael T. Welch, (hereinafter "Welch") was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 24, 2008.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Auerbach.

Pursuant to the terms of the agreement, defendant Welch shall pay plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell the sum of $8,500.00 in two installment payments of $4,250.00 each. The first installment payment of $4,250.00 is payable to plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell on or before May 21, 2008. The second installment payment of $4,250.00 is payable to plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell on or before June 21, 2008. All payments shall be submitted to Mr. Auerbach's Office.

If defendant Welch fails to make the above-mentioned payments, plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell shall submit to defendant Welch a written notice of default, wherein defendant Welch shall have a ten day grace period to make the payment. If defendant Welch fails to cure the default within the allotted time, plaintiff Martindale-Hubbell shall, upon ex parte application, obtain from defendant Welch a judgment in the amount of $13,289.07.

If defendant Welch complies with the terms set forth above, plaintiff Martindale-Hubbel shall dismiss this matter with prejudice, with each party to bear their own costs.

Matter is continued to August 19, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the Dismissal Calendar.
The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
